text: The setup checklist was clear, but I could not find billing settings after signup.
I liked the dashboard because it showed progress quickly, yet inviting teammates was confusing.
Support replied fast, but the answer did not solve my account access problem.
The product feels fast and the reports are useful, although the navigation takes a while to learn.
I want one place to manage billing, teammates, and permissions without hunting through menus.
The onboarding emails were helpful, but they repeated steps I had already finished in the app.
